7:
SELECT segment FROM (
   SELECT c.Segment,
          (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END)) /
           NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
   FROM yearmonth ym
   JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency='EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
   GROUP BY c.Segment
) ORDER BY pct_inc DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT segment FROM (
   SELECT c.Segment,
          (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END)) /
           NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
   FROM yearmonth ym
   JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency='EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
   GROUP BY c.Segment
) ORDER BY pct_inc ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.client_id, (julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date))/365 AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER' AND ca.type = 'gold';	----- bird -----	financial
498:
SELECT a.account_id, d.A2 AS district_name, d.A3 AS district_region
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
  AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM trans t
        WHERE t.account_id = a.account_id
          AND t.date < a.date
      );	----- bird -----	financial
